zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Burleigh於1425年出生在英國倫敦時，她的父親John De Burley V33歲，母親Lady Alice de Grey13歲。她於1463年與John De Westby在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯本結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1505年3月22日在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯本享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Burleigh于1425年出生在英国倫敦时，她的父亲John De Burley V33岁，母亲Lady Alice de Grey13岁。她于1463年与John De Westby在英国英格兰越可爾吉斯本结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1505年3月22日在英国英格兰越可爾吉斯本享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Burleigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Burley
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Burley, for example in Hampshire, Rutland, Shropshire, and Yorkshire, from Old English burh ‘fortified manor, stronghold’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of Swiss German Bürli: from a diminutive of būr ‘peasant, farmer’ (see Bauer ).

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Burleigh was born in 1425, in London, England, her father, John De Burley V, was 33 and her mother, Lady Alice de Grey, was 13. She married John De Westby in 1463, in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 22 March 1505, in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Burleigh est née en 1425, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, John De Burley V, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice de Grey, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé John De Westby en 1463, à Gisburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 22 mars 1505, à Gisburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Burleigh 1425 in London, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John De Burley V 33 und ihre Mutter Lady Alice de Grey 13. Sie hat 1463 in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom John De Westby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 22. März 1505 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Burleigh è nata il nel 1425 nel London, England, sua padre, John De Burley V, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice de Grey, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato John De Westby nel 1463, nel Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 marzo 1505, nel Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Burleighが1425年にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父John De Burley Vは33歳，母Lady Alice de Greyは13歳であった。1463年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアギスブルンでJohn De Westbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1505年3月22日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアギスブルンで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Burleigh(이)가 1425년 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John De Burley V(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice de Grey(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1463년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 지스번에서 John De Westby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1505년 3월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 지스번에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Burleigh nasceu em 1425, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, John De Burley V, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice de Grey, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com John De Westby em 1463, em Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 22 de março de 1505, em Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Burleigh родилась в 1425 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, её отцу по имени John De Burley V было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice de Grey, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John De Westby в 1463 г. в местности гисбурн, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 22 марта 1505 г. в местности гисбурн, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Burleigh nació en 1425, en London, Inglaterra, su papá, John De Burley V, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Lady Alice de Grey, tenía 13 años. Se casó con John De Westby en 1463, en Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de marzo de 1505, en Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años.
